script:
set +e
echo "" | base64 -d | sudo tee /usr/local/bin/migrate-mskai-to-claude.sh >/dev/null
sudo chmod 755 /usr/local/bin/migrate-mskai-to-claude.sh
echo "script bytes: $(wc -c < /usr/local/bin/migrate-mskai-to-claude.sh)"
sudo systemctl reset-failed migrate-mskai-claude.service migrate-mskai-claude.timer 2>/dev/null
sudo systemd-run --on-calendar="2026-05-15 19:00:00" --unit=migrate-mskai-claude /usr/local/bin/migrate-mskai-to-claude.sh 2>&1
echo === armed ===
sudo systemctl list-timers migrate-mskai-claude.timer --all --no-pager | head -5
